name: Meri Laine
title: Meri Laine

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Shredding Up
basic.description: After slashing enemies multiple times, Meri jumps and performs a powerful downward strike.

core.name: Ascending Slam
core.description: Meri leaps lightly forward to slash enemies in front with precision.

skill.name: Grinding Rush
skill.description: Meri quickly charges forward, then performs an upward slash in an instant.

skill.name: Blade Sweep
skill.description: Meri spins to strike nearby enemies.

support.name: Cyclone Spin
support.description: Meri spins multiple times to strike nearby enemies.

qte.name: Aerial Cutter
qte.description: Meri performs a forward aerial spin, slashing enemies multiple times.

ultimate.name: Frozen Drive
ultimate.description: Meri spins her ice saw's blade at extremely high speed, summoning a blizzard and cutting down enemies with devastating force.

passive.name: Pengqueen
passive.description: [Pengqueen Normal Mode] activates at the start of the stage. The user's Power Gauge cannot be charged, but if the [Pengqueen Booster] Gauge reaches 100%, their Power Gauge charges 100%, and the cooldown of Frozen Drive is reset. When Grinding Rush hits, it inflicts 1 instance of [Winter Chill] on a target. When Ascending Slam hits a target affected by [Winter Chill], it activates [Memories of Winter].

advancements: When Grinding Rush hits, it changes to inflict 2 [Winter Chill] instances on the target. Each time Blade Sweep or Raging Sweep hits a target inflicted with [Winter Chill], it activates [Freezing Blood]. Significantly increases Blade Sweep and Raging Sweep Attack Speed. Increases Raging Sweep hit count by 25%.
Increases Water Elemental Accumulation effect by 20%.
The [Memories of Winter] effect is enhanced. Using Frozen Drive activates the [Pengqueen Ice Cream] effect.
For every Water ally in the party, Water team members' Defense Penetration increases by 5%.
The [Pengqueen Booster Mode] and [Freezing Blood] effects are enhanced. When Raging Sweep hits, it inflicts 3 [Winter Chill] instances on the target.
